checks.name: adoption-proof-benchmark acceptance gate
checks.detail: AP checks pass and expose what was checked, expected, and still unproven.

checks.name: adoption-proof-benchmark verdict boundary
checks.detail: Structural/runtime adoption proof only; not external market validation.

checks.name: cli-help-benchmark acceptance gate
checks.detail: All supported commands produce structured help and benchmark checks pass.

checks.name: cli-help-benchmark verdict boundary
checks.detail: Help surface completeness only; does not prove every command behavior is correct.

checks.name: command-routing-audit acceptance gate
checks.detail: Registry, orientation, top commands, and runtime flow align.

checks.name: command-routing-audit verdict boundary
checks.detail: Routing integrity only; does not prove the selected command solves the user's semantic need.

checks.name: need-validation-benchmark acceptance gate
checks.detail: NV checks reject weak/false needs and require validated readiness before project creation.

checks.name: need-validation-benchmark verdict boundary
checks.detail: Validation behavior proof only; semantic truth still requires human/expert/operator evidence.

checks.name: organization-verify acceptance gate
checks.detail: Organization verification passes without unresolved team, council, contract, or artifact refs.

checks.name: organization-verify verdict boundary
checks.detail: Structural integrity only; not proof of product value.

checks.name: release-state-audit acceptance gate
checks.detail: Release state audit passes for the target version.

checks.name: release-state-audit verdict boundary
checks.detail: Release-surface consistency only; not semantic quality proof.
